name: Eggplants with Raisin-Couscous Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups cooked chickpeas, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Prick the eggplant skins with a fork, then wrap each half in foil. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes or until soft; cool until easy to handle.
3. Meanwhile, prepare the couscous according to package directions.
4. Mix the couscous, chickpeas, cherry tomatoes, yogurt, cheese, raisins, basil, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
5. With a spoon, gently scoop out the eggplant flesh, leaving the shells intact. Chop the flesh finely and stir into the couscous mixture.
6. Mound the mixture into the eggplant shells.
7. Arrange the stuffed eggplants in an ungreased 13" x 9" x 2" baking pan.
8. Bake uncovered for 15 minutes or until piping hot.
